meaning: vt.使变硬,使坚强,使冷酷vi.变硬,变冷酷,涨价
examples: Their action can only serve to harden the attitude of landowners.
Test to see if the finish is tacky, and if it is, leave it to harden.
The varnish takes a few hours to harden.
The tests show that it is possible to harden a PC to repel attack.
Harden scored 30 points for the Rockets in the first playoff game in Houston since 2009.
